Subject: Caught! - Leave It to the Professionals
Description: Amateurs attempt outrageous activities; hilarious stunts, spills, and thrills gone wrong showcase backyard engineering, clueless humans and uncooperative machinery.

Subject: Caught! - The Friendly Skies
Description: A compilation of hilarious clips from around the world featuring airborne comedy, including in-flight antics and unexpected encounters in the air.

Subject: Contraband: Seized at the Border - Joint Failure
Description: When a trailer full of sea salt shows up at the bridge, officers decide to inspect it; the bags do contain a crystalline substance and it's an illicit one; during an inspection of a U.S. citizen, something illegal rolls out of his pocket.

Subject: Contraband: Seized at the Border - On the Rocks
Description: When a man waiting in the pedestrian line to enter the U.S. suddenly turns and sprints back toward Mexico, officers give chase; a Mexican national seeks asylum in the U.S. after claiming he was kidnapped and extorted for information by cartels.

Subject: Contraband: Seized at the Border - Marshal Matters
Description: Officers discover an illicit load in a shipment of garbage bags; a U.S. Marshal exhibits some disorderly conduct; a woman previously imprisoned for trafficking meth is found with an excessive amount of pills; knockoff luxury goods are uncovered.

Subject: Contraband: Seized at the Border - Going Out With a Bang
Description: A retiring officer makes a significant bust before hanging up his hat; a bus arrives with more than just passengers in tow; a mother wanted on a nine year old warrant for theft is apprehended; a car unexpectedly explodes in the middle of a bridge.

Subject: Contraband: Seized at the Border - Seedy Behavior
Description: When an older couple crossing into the US has cartel logos on their packed clothes, they have some explaining to do; a Mexican driver says he's visiting a friend in Texas, but seems nervous; a vehicle search finds evidence of hidden compartments.

Subject: Contraband: Seized at the Border - Judge, Jury and Executioner
Description: A Canadian national finds himself in hot water for illegally working for his uncle in the U.S.; a man tries crossing while carrying cosmetic injections stuffed into a sweet treat; a rookie officer follows a hunch after a trend of narcotics smuggling.

Subject: Contraband: Seized at the Border - Someone's Knockin' at the Door
Description: Officers get a surprise with narcotics hide within a shipment of rubber; suspicions raise when a routine X-ray reveals packages hidden inside the tires of a truck; a missing teenager with a rap sheet is turned in to the authorities.

Subject: Contraband: Seized at the Border - Don't Get Cocky
Description: Two men are caught attempting to smuggle a rooster for cockfighting; officers find millions of dollars of counterfeit goods; a woman flees after dumping drugs on the bridge; an illicit load is found hidden in the axles of a lowboy trailer.

Subject: Contraband: Seized at the Border - Florida or Bust
Description: A concealed shipment is hidden in the fifth wheel of a tractor-trailer; officers searching a courier's van find a lethal cache; an unlikely source sets off the radiation detector; a young woman is detained for a warrant she didn't know she had.

Subject: Contraband: Seized at the Border - Operation Block-Blitz
Description: Two sisters are detained when one of them attacks an officer after a day of binge drinking; a man claiming to be traveling for business has something to hide; on a hectic day, officers conduct a special operation using the bridge's K9 team.

Subject: Contraband: Seized at the Border - Coming Back to America
Description: Officers prepare for the extradition of a cartel boss; travelers try to fool officers into allowing their illicit loads over the border; a truck stolen by a cartel comes back to America; a man attempts to conceal pills where officers can't find them.

Subject: Contraband: Seized at the Border - The Rookies
Description: New officers entering the ranks are put through their paces, and one rookie proves her worth; a couple from Mexico arrives with candy unfit for children's consumption; a van full of household furniture hides an illicit surprise.

Subject: Mud Madness - Hearts Break, Axles Snap
Description: AJ and Bryce fight for the top spot; Josh takes a reckless risk to rescue his season, endangering his life in a high-stakes bet; tensions and gossip rise in the mud world when AJ and Madi's relationship falters.

Subject: Deadliest Catch - Bring Out the Monster
Description: Keith & Jake deploy guerrilla tactics when a factory trawler invades their grounds; at the Russian Line, Rick encounters temperatures so frigid that even snow crab can't survive on deck; Sig struggles against mounting breakdowns.

Subject: How It's Made - Graphene, World's Smallest Car; Force Testers; Composite Cans
Description: Curious minds find out how things like graphene, the world's smallest car, force testers and composite cars are manufactured.

Subject: How It's Made - Condoms; Classic Car Gauges; Chocolate Marble Truffle Cake
Description: How classic car gauges, chocolate marble cake, ghillie kettles and rubber gloves are made.

Subject: How It's Made - Race Car Oil Tanks, Plaster Moldings, Lemongrass Oil, and Fly Tying Vises
Description: Learning how race car oil, plaster moldings, lemongrass oil and fly tying vices are made.

Subject: How It's Made - Pasta Dies; Blueberries; Composting Toilets
Description: Exploring how everyday items like pasta dies, blueberries, composting toilets and surge arresters are made.

Subject: How It's Made - Wooden Utensils, Refrigeration Units, Moccasins, and Electric Impact Drills
Description: How wood utensils, refrigeration units, moccasins and impact drills are made.

Subject: How It's Made - Fish Rubbings, Clay Shooting Machines, Almonds, and High-end Motorcycles
Description: Fish rubbings; clay shooting machines; almonds; high-end motorcycles.

Subject: Homestead Rescue - Heartland Heartache
Description: Farmsteaders are on the verge of losing the legacy of their late father; the Raneys must quickly give them an off-grid masterclass and help them complete one of the most unique rescues.

Subject: Homestead Rescue - Brown Bear-anoia
Description: An Alaska family's homestead grinds to a halt, facing an invasion of brown bears displaced by recent wildfires; the Raneys help them build the first-ever homestead fortress to safeguard their livelihood amidst the apex predators.

Subject: Homestead Rescue - Raney Returns: Broken Bridges
Description: With another big storm on the horizon, Marty responds to a new desperate plea from the Bower Family in eastern Vermont; with their only property access route wiped out by a 100-year flood, Marty must devise a new plan, without Misty or Matt.

Subject: Homestead Rescue - Mesa Meltdown - Part 1
Description: A young family is on the brink of giving up during their first brutal winter in Arizona's high desert; as another round of snowstorms approaches, the Raneys race to solve the homestead's freezing water, food issues and inadequate livestock quarters.

Subject: Gold Rush - Records Will Be Broken
Description: Parker launches a cutthroat plan for a 10,000-ounce season -- and he poaches a rival's crew member; Tony cashes in early with a big score; Rick scrambles to find new ground.

Subject: Gold Rush - Eager Beavers
Description: Tony battles a big beaver to get at the gold; Parker poaches more crew, doubling gold production; Rick tries to strike a deal for a new claim.

Subject: Gold Rush - Rick's Bold Call
Description: Rick balks at the terms for his new claim and makes a bold move; Parker's foreman, Tyson, battles a flooded cut and a batch of new recruits; Tony explodes on a batch of rookies flipping over trucks.

Subject: Gold Rush - Buzz in the Hills
Description: Parker pushes Mitch to deliver Sulphur Creek gold and records a big score; Buzz lands on an unlikely claim; Tony's pressure tests a new foreman.

Subject: When It All Changes
Description: Parker puts it all on the line when he buys Dominion Creek; the Beets family erupts into chaos when eldest son Kevin takes the year off; after disappearing for a year, Rick Ness tries to pull off a longshot comeback.

Subject: Gold Rush - It's Good to Be King
Description: Determined to keep his hot streak going, Tony scrambles to save a flipped rock truck and replace a downed bridge; later, he tallies up his gold.

Description: Pushing into their breaking point, the fleet scrambles to collect the first Opilio windfall in three years; Clark takes the skipper role after Sig's collapse; Keith returns with a vengeance; rogue waves threaten Jake's operation.

Subject: Strange Evidence - Return of the Witch
Description: When something strange is recorded flying in Mexico, some wonder if it's a witch reputed to kidnap children; others believe it's evidence of a new way to smuggle drugs or a top-secret technology.

Subject: Strange Evidence - The Skinwalker Awakens
Description: On a Native American reservation in Utah, evidence of a man transforming into an animal is caught on camera, and some experts ask if it's proof of a Skinwalker, a legendary evil creature that can shapeshift into a deadly beast.

Subject: Strange Evidence - Secrets of the Himalaya Alien
Description: When a bizarre, alien skeleton is found in an abandoned compound in the Himalayas, some speculate that it's the corpse of a newly-dead dinosaur, and using cutting-edge tech, experts investigate if it's evidence of a top-secret Jurassic Park.

Subject: Strange Evidence - Alien of the Amazon
Description: When cameras capture footage of a strange, blob-like alien in the Amazon jungle, some experts suspect that the origins of this monster are stranger-than-fiction; using cutting-edge science, investigators try to explain this bizarre beast.

Subject: Strange Evidence - Escobar's Ghost
Description: Cameras capture footage of a ghostly figure in the window of Pablo Escobar's abandoned luxury building, mere moments before it is demolished, and some believe it was the notorious drug lord himself.

Subject: Expedition Files - Invisible Enemies
Description: Josh Gates steps into the past to examine unsolved mysteries; featuring the alleged alien abduction of Travis Walton, the bizarre death of American hero Charles Lindbergh's son, and the invisible attacks visited upon CIA operatives in Cuba.

Subject: Expedition Unknown - Code Breakers
Description: Deciphering clues left by the Zodiac Killer, leading to a prime suspect; revealing the location of Forrest Fenn's million-dollar buried treasure; decoding the Voynich Manuscript, a text that possibly explains the origins of life.

Subject: Expedition Files - Mysterious Relics
Description: A new study suggests the Shroud of Turin may be authentic, while researchers analyze old ghost photos with new tools; the creator of the Georgia Guidestones is identified.

Subject: Expedition Files - Time Reveals All
Description: A body is found on a beach with only a cryptic note; the Trojan War and the Trojan Horse were once thought to be pure myth, but the discovery of ruins reveals they were all too real; new evidence may prove Shakespeare didn't write his own works.

Subject: Expedition Files - Madness Explained
Description: Was witchcraft at work during the Salem witch trials, or an undiagnosed psychological illness?; did Britain's famous UFO sighting by officials have a more earthly explanation?; who's really responsible for the murder of the Mad Monk of Russia?

Subject: Expedition Unknown - Buried Secrets of Hitler
Description: With word of an urgent lead, Josh jets to Poland to join in the opening of a secret Nazi tunnel system dug into a dormant volcano; Josh helps a local team tear away a stone wall built by the Germans in the last days of World War II.

Subject: Expedition Unknown - Buried Secrets of the Nazis
Description: Josh Gates rafts into an abandoned tunnel system to chase art and treasure stolen by the Third Reich; the diary of a high-ranking SS officer leads to a search for tons of stolen gold; Josh searches for a buried Nazi Enigma machine.

Subject: Expedition Unknown - Mystery of Dead Mountain
Description: Braving sub-zero conditions in Siberia, Josh Gates investigates the Dyatlov Pass incident, during which nine hikers died under suspicious circumstances in 1959.

Subject: Expedition Unknown - Siberia's Coldest Case
Description: Josh Gates concludes his in-depth investigation of the Dyatlov Pass incident; taking on Dead Mountain's brutal conditions, Josh and two investigators retrace the last steps of the hikers; a big discovery could finally solve the mystery.

Subject: Expedition Unknown - The Nazi's Lost Super Sub
Description: Josh dives the deadly, frigid waters of the Baltic Sea in search of a revolutionary Nazi submarine: the V-80. Hitler ordered it scuttled to prevent the Allies from learning its secrets. Now, Josh risks it all to bring the prototype to the surface.

Subject: Expedition Unknown - The Real Goonies Treasure
Description: Josh braves the Oregon coast to search for the real-life pirate treasure that inspired his all-time favorite movie; on the rocky shores of the Pacific, he finds pieces of a Spanish galleon that wrecked in 1694.

Subject: Expedition Files - Lost Treasures
Description: What really became of Konigsberg Castle's Amber Room, stolen by the Nazis? Could a lost hard drive in a British landfill hold millions in Bitcoin? Did King Solomon's legendary mines ever exist?

Subject: Ghost Adventures - Rage on the River
Description: In Reno, NV, Zak helps a couple consumed by overwhelming darkness while renovating the abandoned River Inn, causing them to sleep in an RV; the crew suspects nearby hot springs are connected to the unnerving activity and the property's history.

Description: Zak and the crew return to the Glen Tavern Inn in Santa Paula, Calif., to help its staff find closure after the loss of a local medium; Korn singer Jonathan Davis assists as the team digs deeper into the dark mysteries of the former gambling house.

Subject: Deadliest Catch - Million-Dollar Bounties
Description: As buyers close their doors, the fleet scrambles to collect its first opilio windfall in three years.

Subject: Caught! - Backcountry Crooks
Description: Uncharted wilderness and untamed backcountry full of rugged terrain and wild inhabitants; police officers surviving and thriving as they take down criminals, prevent catastrophes and save lives.

Subject: Caught! - Travel Hell
Description: As travel stats reach new heights and patience hits rock bottom, millions of conflicts erupt in planes, trains, and automobiles worldwide; from road rage to high-altitude meltdowns, it's a wild ride in the world of travel.

Subject: Caught! - Disorder in the Court

Subject: Caught! - High Crimes

Description: Searching for the hidden entrance to the cave system, the team uncovers an ancient vent shaft above the Energy Zone, but an explosion triggers an underground tsunami that threatens to flood the cave system.

Description: In Puerto Rico, Josh Gates explores caves and treks through dense jungles in search of the chupacabra; working with a wildlife biologist, a veterinarian and an investigator, Josh explores a recent wave of attacks to separate fact from fiction.

Subject: Expedition Unknown - The Nazi's Lost Super Sub

Subject: The Louvre Heist: Minute by Minute
Description: Dive into an investigation of the shocking daylight robbery at Paris' Louvre Museum as former thieves, security staff, eyewitnesses and investigators piece together the crime and ongoing chase to recover France's crown jewels before it's too late.

Subject: Expedition Unknown - America's First Train Robbers
Description: Josh tracks down the legend and treasure of an outlaw posse, who terrorized the Midwest's railroads; Josh tracks the Reno Gang's lost loot to a cave hideout that could hold millions.

Subject: Botched Presents: Plastic Surgery Rewind - Welcome to the Rewind Retreat

Subject: Botched Presents: Plastic Surgery Rewind - Deflated Egos

Description: The house guests are reunited at the Rewind Retreat with their new looks; Aubrey, Jessica and Sophia reveal if they chose to rewind or not; Michelle joins the group to take a deep dive on how this rewind experience has changed their lives.

Subject: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles - Medieval Time Machine
Description: Altman lists a castle in Beverly Ridge; Flagg finds himself opposite Fredrik, trying to negotiate a deal while getting a fair price for his client; James and David are under pressure to get their latest Zach Vella listing sold.

Subject: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles - One for the 'Gram
Description: Altman throws an epic launch event for a modern with a $48 million price tag and a social media twist; Tracy gets creative to find a buyer for her new WeHo modern; Los Angeles wildfires have a devastating impact on the market.

Subject: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles - Hollywood Royalty
Description: Altman and Tracy co-list a historic Hollywood estate previously owned by Hollywood legend John Barrymore; James and David go all-in on their new East Coast traditional.

Subject: The High Note (2020)

Subject: Pitch Perfect 3 (2017)

Subject: Mean Girls (2004)
Description: Cady Heron is a hit with The Plastics, the A-list girl clique at her new school, until she makes the mistake of falling for Aaron Samuels, the ex-boyfriend of alpha Plastic Regina George.

Description: Dwight and Andy plan a hunting trip; Charles asks Jim for a ``rundown``, and Jim tries to figure out what that is; Michael hosts a paper and pancakes luncheon.

Subject: Girl Meets Farm - Bash After Baby

Description: Chefs Kelsey Barnard Clark, Carlos Anthony and Crista Luedtke set their friendships aside for a culinary competition.

Description: With heart and determination an Illinois youth (Sean Astin) tackles shortcomings to play Notre Dame football.

Subject: A Few Good Men (1992)
Description: Navy lawyers (Tom Cruise, Demi Moore) defend two Marines accused of killing a private at the naval station at Guantanamo Bay, Cuba.

Subject: Field of Dreams (1989)
Description: An inspired Iowa farmer builds a baseball field, then sees ``Shoeless`` Joe Jackson's ghost and other marvels.

Subject: Rudy (1993)
Description: With heart and determination an Illinois youth (Sean Astin) tackles shortcomings to play Notre Dame football.

Subject: A Few Good Men (1992)
Description: Navy lawyers (Tom Cruise, Demi Moore) defend two Marines accused of killing a private at the naval station at Guantanamo Bay, Cuba.

Subject: Chasing the Rains - The Fickle River
Description: In Samburu, matriarch Anastasia turns her elephant herd north after a local river dries up; cheetah mom Kuleta evades a crafty pack of hyenas in Naboisho; checking in on wild dog Phoenix and her new litter in Laikipia.

Subject: Chasing the Rains - Blood and Dust
Description: How elephants dig wells; a sudden river-filling downpour; cheetah Kuleta loses one of her cubs to lions; wild dog Phoenix faces off with a hyena mob.

Subject: Planet Earth: Blue Planet II - The Deep
Description: An unimaginable abundance of life in the pitch-black darkness of the seabed; Antarctica is the coldest, harshest and most remote continent on earth.

Subject: Planet Earth: Blue Planet II - Coral Reefs
Description: Coral reefs are home to one-quarter of all marine species and survival in these undersea megacities is a challenge with many different solutions; a turtle heads to the reef's equivalent of a health spa, but she must use trickery to avoid the queue.

Subject: Planet Earth: Blue Planet II - Coasts
Description: At the coast, two worlds collide. Coasts is the story of how our wildlife survives in this ever-changing world. It's a roller-coaster ride of heart-stopping action and epic drama, with characters from beautiful to bizarre.

Subject: Planet Earth: Blue Planet II - Our Blue Planet
Description: Pioneers strive to protect the ocean from the effects of human activity.

Subject: Planet Earth: Blue Planet II - Green Seas
Description: In green seas, competition is fierce. Sunlight powers vast kelp forests, mangroves, prairies of seagrass and blooms of algae. Here, animals must fight for space and food. In kelp forests, a common octopus must become the ultimate escape artist.

Subject: David Attenborough's Global Adventure
Description: In his eighties, David Attenborough embarked on a seven-year journey; from the stunning Great Barrier Reef to the rainforests of Borneo, follow his voyage across the globe.

Subject: The Blues Brothers (1980)
Description: Joliet Jake (John Belushi) and Elwood Blues (Dan Aykroyd), brothers on a mission from God, bomb around Chicago in an old police car, reuniting their hot band.

Description: The No. 22 Panthers (8-3, 6-1) host the No. 12 Hurricanes (9-2, 5-2) in a clash of ACC title game contenders. Pitt needs a victory, and a loss by SMU or Virginia to play for the championship. Miami must win, and have Virginia Tech win or Duke lose.

Subject: College Football - LSU at Oklahoma
Description: The No. 8 Sooners (9-2, 5-2 SEC) surge into a regular-season finale with the Tigers (7-4, 3-4). Oklahoma has won three straight games, all against Top 25 teams, and would all but assure itself a spot in the College Football Playoff by beating LSU.

Subject: College Football - Alabama at Auburn
Description: SEC rivals in the No. 10 Crimson Tide (9-2, 6-1) and Tigers (5-6, 1-6) meet in the Iron Bowl. Alabama leads the series 51-37-1. The Crimson Tide will earn a berth in the SEC championship game if they beat the Tigers for the sixth straight time.

Subject: College Football - Virginia Tech at Virginia
Description: The Hokies face the No. 18 Cavaliers in the Commonwealth Clash series. Virginia Tech is 23-2 versus rival Virginia on the gridiron since 1999. UVA will play in the ACC title game with a win, or with combined losses from SMU, NC State and Syracuse.

Subject: College Football - Notre Dame at Stanford
Description: The No. 9 Fighting Irish end their regular season by visiting the Cardinal. Notre Dame has won nine straight games, against teams with a combined 45-53 record entering Week 14, after scoring its most points since 1932 in a 70-7 win over Syracuse.

Subject: Unsportsmanlike with Evan, Canty and Michelle

Subject: College Football - UCF at BYU
Description: The No. 11 Cougars host the Knights in a regular-season finale. BYU is in the driver's seat for its first Big 12 title-game appearance after holding off Cincinnati in Week 13. LJ Martin ran for 101 yards and a touchdown to help BYU beat UCF in 2024.

Subject: College Football - Florida State at Florida
Description: The Seminoles (5-6) try to clinch bowl eligibility as they visit the Gators (3-8) in a Florida Cup clash. Florida won four of the last six Sunshine Showdown meetings, but Florida State picked up a 24-15 victory in its last visit to The Swamp in 2023.

Description: Each week, a half-hour episode will focus on a select team and explore previously unaired footage and sounds from game preparation, the sideline and following the final whistle.

Subject: College Football - SMU at California
Description: The No. 21 Mustangs try to secure a berth in the ACC title game as they visit the Golden Bears. SMU has won six of its past seven and controls its fate as championship weekend looms. Kevin Jennings (SMU) created nine TDs in his last three games.

Subject: SEC Storied - Before They Were Cowboys
Description: A look at how Jerry Jones and Jimmy Johnson teamed up to help lead the 1964 Arkansas Razorbacks football squad to its only undefeated season in history, long before they joined forces to win two Super Bowls with the NFL's Dallas Cowboys.

Subject: Southern Hoops: A History of SEC Basketball - Part One (1930-1959)
Description: Adolph Rupp comes to the University of Kentucky in 1930, two years before the SEC is formed, and his Wildcats go on to dominate play in the conference for decades. Meanwhile, a future coaching legend later known as Pat Summitt is born in Tennessee.

Subject: Southern Hoops: A History of SEC Basketball - Part Two (1960-1970)
Description: Texas Western's historic win over Adolph Rupp's Kentucky team in the 1966 NCAA final marks a turning point in the SEC. Vanderbilt's Perry Wallace becomes the conference's first Black player, while at LSU, Pete Maravich rewrites the record books.

Subject: Southern Hoops: A History of SEC Basketball - Part Three (1971-1979)
Description: Dale Brown brings an infectious personality to LSU while Pat Summitt begins her legendary coaching career at Tennessee. And the year after Adolph Rupp's death in 1977, his successor Joe B. Hall leads Kentucky to its first NCAA title in 20 years.

Subject: Southern Hoops: A History of SEC Basketball - Part Four (1980-1989)
Description: Georgia's Dominique Wilkins and Auburn's Charles Barkley headline the SEC's successes in the early 1980s, while LSU's Dale Brown takes two teams to the Final Four. Pat Summitt wins her first two national titles at Tennessee.

Subject: Southern Hoops: A History of SEC Basketball - Part Five (1990-1998)
Description: Arkansas joins the SEC and becomes one of the conference's top teams, led by fiery coach Nolan Richardson and his ``40 Minutes of Hell'' attack. Kentucky returns to prominence, and at Tennessee, Pat Summitt wins three straight NCAA titles.

Subject: Southern Hoops: A History of SEC Basketball - Part Six (1998-2010)
Description: In his first year at Kentucky, Tubby Smith becomes the third Black coach ever to win a national title. Florida's back-to-back NCAA crowns mark the rise of a new power. The Lady Vols win 2 straight NCAA titles as LSU reaches 5 straight Final Fours.

Subject: Southern Hoops: A History of SEC Basketball - Part Seven (2011-2022)
Description: John Calipari continues the winning tradition at Kentucky with a national championship in 2012. Four years later, Pat Summitt passes away after battling early-onset Alzheimer's disease. Dawn Staley leads South Carolina to a pair of NCAA titles.

Subject: Women's College Basketball - Connecticut at Xavier
Description: The No. 1 Huskies (6-0) look to keep rolling against the Musketeers (4-2) in this Big East opener. UConn is 9-0 in the all-time series, and outgunned Xavier by an averaging of 46.8 points per contest in their four previous meetings in Cincinnati.

Subject: Women's College Basketball - Tennessee at UCLA
Description: The No. 14 Lady Volunteers (5-1) head west to challenge the No. 3 Bruins (7-1). Tennessee seeks its first win over UCLA since 2011. UCLA bounced back from its first loss of the season by thrashing Duke 89-59, with Gabriela Jaquez scoring 23 points.

Subject: College Football - Air Force at Colorado State
Description: Colorado State and Air Force compete for the Ram-Falcon Trophy in Fort Collins, Colo. The Falcons lead the rivalry series 39-22-1, first facing the Rams in 1957. Air Force has won 15 of the past 18 meetings, but CSU snapped a seven-game skid in 2024.

Subject: College Football - Cincinnati at TCU
Description: The Horned Frogs (7-4, 4-4 Big 12) and Bearcats (7-4, 5-3) put the finishing touches on their regular-season slates. In 2024, TCU spoiled Cincinnati's bid for bowl eligibility with a 20-13 victory in the first meeting between the schools in 20 years.

Subject: College Football - Colorado at Kansas State
Description: The Wildcats (5-6, 4-4 Big 12) try to secure a bowl game when they host the Buffaloes (3-8, 1-7). Kansas State went 3-1 in the postseason over the previous four campaigns. KSU edged out Colorado 31-28 last year in their first meeting since 2010.

Subject: College Football - Northwestern at Illinois
Description: Illinois and Northwestern compete for the Land of Lincoln Trophy at Memorial Stadium. The Fighting Illini lead the series 58-55-5 after winning three of the past four meetings. Illinois is 5-1 at home, losing only to No. 1 Ohio State.

Subject: College Football - Wisconsin at Minnesota

Subject: NFL Football - Green Bay Packers at Detroit Lions
Description: The Lions take their traditional seat on Thanksgiving Day with the NFC North rival Packers sitting across the table. Green Bay defeated Detroit 29-22 on Turkey Day in 2023. The Lions are out for revenge after losing to the Packers 27-13 in Week 1.

Subject: NFL Football - Kansas City Chiefs at Dallas Cowboys
Description: The Chiefs (6-5) visit the Cowboys (5-5-1) for a Thanksgiving Day duel. Dallas is 34-22-1 on this holiday after winning its last three such games. The Cowboys and Chiefs rallied for victories over the Eagles and Colts, respectively, in Week 12.
